Name: Strategic Direction Assessment
Documentation: Indicates the organization's ability to reassess and adapt its direction.

Name: Digital Transformation Strategy
Documentation: If seen as a structured initiative, Course of Action. If seen as an ability of the organization, Capability.

Name: Digital Transformation Process
Documentation: Reconfiguring Offerings & Value Propositions. Represents an internal operational change to business offerings.

Name: Current Business Risks
Documentation: Risks can be modeled as an Assessment entity, influencing strategy.

Name: Resulting Business Risk
Documentation: it’s the result of analyzing the situation and identifying risk

Name: Business Opportunities
Documentation: If seen as an internal trigger, it can be a Business Event. If seen as an external influencing factor, it can be a Driver.

Name: Current Organization's Offering
Documentation: In Motivation terms, these might be Outcomes if you want to show them as end results (“We have an existing offering” vs. “We aim for a digital offering”).

Name: Dedicated Risk Management
Documentation: If you want to show why they influence goals, keep them as Stakeholders in the Motivation layer.

Name: Top Management
Documentation: If you want to show why they influence goals, keep them as Stakeholders in the Motivation layer.

Name: Current Value Proposition
Documentation: The relative worth, utility, or importance of a core element or an outcome.
